title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness for building agent workflows. Cole Medin uses it to power his AI Dark Factory, a self-building codebase that deploys its own code through a custom agent orchestration system. The framework enables intelligent routing of tasks across multiple LLM providers for optimized performance.
